data: Transfer the effects of afflictions from someone else to yourself.
Channel a fell curse through your gaze.
As disguise self, but you can change the disguise as a swift action.
Force your attacker to suffer mental pain when harming you.
Blast of air deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage and knocks opponent upward.
Make 1 knowledge check /3 levels with a +10 bonus
Vines beneath your feet stabilize you but slow you down.
Send or receive a Tiny or smaller animal via teleportation.
Magical auras become visible to you.
Use a creature's corpse to adopt its form
Sap the strength of those around you.
Alignment auras become visible to you.
Cause the target to avoid an object or location.
Target becomes nauseated and causes nearby creatures to become fascinated.
Fog obscures the vision of others and extends the range of your hexes.
-6 to an ability score; -4 on attack rolls, saves, and checks; or 50% chance of losing each action.
Compel a companion to take damage for you
Increase the cost to use mythic power.
Magnify the target's ability to smell the presence of blood.
Cause a target's bones to erupt in sharp, jagged spurs, inflicting bleed and sickened
As entangle, but deals fire damage and obscures the area with smoke
Skull acts as magic mouth, listeners are shaken.
Cause the target's attacks to gain a miss chance.
Surround yourself with an aura of nothingness.
Make a willing target appear to be dead.
Fuel a target's spellcasting, spontaneously cast spells without expending the slot.
Compel a creature to aid others rather than use violence.
Hear or see at a distance for 1 min./level.
Clear out vegetation from a small area.
Apply a metamagic property to an ally's spell.
Ask more powerful entities to find and converse with you
Draw a recently dead creature's soul into a gem.
Causes a creature to become dehydrated.
Target can't gain the benefit of any luck ability.
Target a creature with a curse that impacts its ability to fly.
Target object curses the next creature to touch it
Turn a potion into a pool of necromantic energy.
Stun a creature with pain for 1 round
Puts 10 HD of creatures to sleep.
Blame someone else for your actions.
As delay poison, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Learn what makes a creautre anxious.
Remove a creature's ability to poison others
Touch attack makes a construct helpless for 1 round/level.
Dissipate the charges from a technical object or hamper a creature with the robot subtype.
Cancels one magical spell or effect.
Read thought echoes of a creature mentally controlling another.
Cause living creatures to lose their immunity to fear or mind-affecting effects vs your spells.
Drain a creature's poison and apply it to your weapon.
Unleash a tremor that creates difficult terrain and can knock foes down and damage them
Target gains the eldritch ague spellblight.
Eat away at the damage reduction and natural armor of your opponent.
Acid boils burst when you are attacked.
Summon a lens of force to help protect yourself from figments/patterns or identify items.
Target takes Dex and Con damage.
Create a menacing duplicate of yourself to interact with others.
Learn many of the target's weaknesses and gain a +5 bonus on your next attack.
Give a creature legs, allowing it to walk on land.
Ammunition in the targeted firearm creates a tremendous flash capable of blinding the weapon's bearer and those around him.
As summon swarm, but the swarm makes creatures more susceptible to transmutation spells along with penalizing Dexterity.
Creature's armor and shield lose 1 AC and hardness/hour
Subject flies at speed of 60 ft.
Warp a creature's flesh, inflicting deformaties and penalties to Constitution and Charisma
Gain the effects of freedom of movement, but also become drunk
Plant a seed of doubt in the target, causing self-doubt.
Create bolts of negative energy to harm the living or heal the undead, possibly blinding the target.
Inscription harms those who pass it.
Cause an object to briefly transform into gold.
Use a mass of tentacles to perform dirty tricks.
Bless a monument to imbue nearby humans with 2/magic damage reduction.
Know approximate distance from where you cast this spell.
Target takes a -10 penalty to Sense Motive and creatures using Bluff against them gain a +10 bonus on such checks
Curse a target with a supernatually delicious scent, attracting animalistic monsters.
Use a Harrow deck to predict the future.
Touched target only gains and grants half the benefits from magical healing
You siphon half of all magical healing that the targeted creature receives.
Enable weapons to overcome DR like adamantine, cold iron, or silver.
Gives +2 on attack rolls, saves, skill checks.
Inscription casts your hex on those who pass it.
Target's weapons deal damage as if they were smaller.
Cause creatures to gain a phobia
Levitates the targeted creature up off the ground.
Screaming pain limits the target's actions.
Make targets become deathly afraid of water.
Force a number of giant spears of ice from the ground.
Target becomes addicted to a drug.
Target takes a -4 penalty on attack rolls, skill checks, and ability checks.
Create insects to scout an area for you.
Turn creatures skeleton into sharp iron, increased effect against creatures vulnerable to cold iron
Hurl a spike of cold iron at a foe
Flood an area with dangerous radiation.
Look through a mirror and see out of another mirror.
Make a creature invisible and silent to their allies.
Fill the target with a sense of entitled self-importance.
Add to your ki pool when you critically hit.
Create a cackling lash of unholy lightning.
Senses direction toward object (specific or type).
You roll damage twice when you roll damage for a critical hit and take the best damage.
Inspire yourself or a lover into a rage against someone who wronged you.
Curse a dying creature to finish it off and gain hero points from its life force.
As magic jar, but limited to line of sight.
Deal damage to yourself to damage the marked target
Cause two creatures to fall in love.
Target must act as though they are wandering through a maze.
Target gains a message that can be given only to its intended recipient.
Create up to four motes that shed light or darkness.
Speed up the decomposition of a corpse.
Creature leaves a trail of stinking cloud squares.
Make undead more difficult to control.
Make it permanently easier to learn more about a target.
+2 enhancement to Dexterity and Intelligence, gain use of any one feat.
Mask your features with shadowy illumination.
Grant tactical knowledge to your allies, increasing their AC and Reflex saves.
Convince a target hat it contracted an affliction.
Creature re-lives an injury, taking 1d6 damage/level
As per dimension door, but with more restrictions and affecting a creature you touch
Call an outsider to answer questions
Grant a plant creature the ability to speak, hear, and understand you.
Ward a container with summoned vipers.
Give your familiar the shape of another animal.
Curse the target with the weaknesses of your vampirism.
Force the unluck effect of a pugwampi onto an unwilling creature.
Transforms a single animal or magical beast into a younger and cuter version of itself for a short period of time.
Target forgets how to use commonly used objects.
Assault the mind of your enemies with your hideous face
Reduce the target's ability to tap into a specific energy type
Gives +2 to Str and Con, +1 on Will saves, -2 to AC.
Animate an area of rocks to create a dangerous, rolling area of debris.
Summon a swarm of poisonous frogs.
Target weapon gains bonus damage for defeating enemies.
Target is compelled to stay near another.
Cures normal or magical blindness or deafness.
Frees object or person from curse.
Transfer some of your mythic essence to another creature.
As returning weapon, but you may divide the duration among weapons touched.
Grant a suit of armor limited animation when its wearer falls unconcious or is killed
See events transpiring along a natural watercourse you touch.
As scale spikes, except with a higher enhancement bonus.
Extract a half-formed parasitic clone from the target, causing it to siphon blood and distract its host.
As secret chest, except the coffer is smaller and can only remain on the Ethereal Plane for a short time.
+5 Perception (+10 vs ethereal or invisible) for 24 hours, discharge to temporarily gain x-ray vision
Create a group of wafting seeds with magical intellect that can spy for you.
Enhance the sight of all creatures near you.
Creates a snake-shaped text symbol that immobilizes reader.
Cause the joints of an enemy's armor to stiffen and wrap around the wearer.
Imbue targets with a fraction of your mythic nature.
Perceive the world around your familiar.
Take a negative level to grant another creature of the same gender a bonus on their casting ability.
Obscure the appearance of all creatures within the shifting shadows.
Cone of silver darts deals 1d6 piercing damage/level, less against armored targets.
Drain strength from a creature and transfer it to another.
Allow the target to swim through the air.
Draw out a creatures inner sin
Target takes 1d6 damage for each spell affecting it
Gain a bond with 1 creature/3 levels for 24 hours. End bond to send a message as Sending
Create a mobile area of bright light while also suppressing light surrounding it.
Give the target a -4 penalty on ability checks, skill checks, and any checks requiring concentration.
Move mundane text from a book into a blank copy.
Temporarily steal youth and vitality from the target.
Use lightning to quickly travel a short distance, harming all in your path.
Compels subject to follow stated course of action.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
As black tentacles, except creating a decapitated snake to grapple your enemies.
Summon a swarm of animated, flying teeth.
Triggered rune causes nearby creatures to bleed.
As entangle, plus plants make ranged attacks.
Gain two more faces, which grant you bonuses to sight
When rolling a d20, roll 3d20 and choose the middle result
Grant allies a +4 bonus to resist enchantments/illusions.
Turn your blood into venom, poisoning creatures that wound you
Force a target to save against its own poison.
Bestow your regeneration on your allies.
Cover the target creature in burning acid.
Avoid critical hits and sneak attacks by making your vital organs writhe around.
Target is compelled to avoid another creature.
As per unhallowed blows, but a +1 bonus per 4 caster levels
As rage, except affecting only undead.
Creature takes a penalty to rolls based on number of hero points possessed.
Conjure a small team of tiny engineers to construct a trap for you.
Grant a target the fangs and hunger of a vampire.
Touch deals 1d6 damage per two levels; caster gains damage as temporary hp.
Entwine your words with poison, harming the target if they share your message.
Take the form and some of the powers of a Small or Medium vermin.
Grant ability to speak, read, and write one or more languages for 8 hours.
Enhance a creature with the power of a season.
Subject treads on water as if solid.
Create a poison which looks like clean and pure water.
A cone of blood pushes creatures, sickens them, and makes the ground slick.
Sprout poisonous thorns from your wings.
See through the target's eyes and ears.
Triggered rune slows the movements of creatures in the area
You become immune to diseases and toxins, absorb one, and then spread it to others.
As alter self, but you can change the shape as a swift action.
Flying storm cloud deals 6d6 electricity damage.
Incorporeal creatures stay 10 ft. away from you.
Constrain the target so they cannot make attack rolls against anyone except those of the opposite alignment.
Transport yourself and willing creatures to a random planar destination
Merge a melee weapon with a rod or staff.
Use a likeness to adopt a dead creature's form
Gain ferocity, bonus hit points, and +4 vs. mind-affecting effects.
Create an enormous beanstalk that leads into the clouds.
Affected creatures don't count as allies for any purpose
Grants the target the benefits of an improved planar infusion
Gain a pool of luck that can be used to add a luck bonus to any d20 rolls, which can turn a failure into a success
Compel a summoned creature to attack its summoner.
Inflict a specific and feared pirate curse onto your target.
Tentacles grapple all creatures within a 20-ft. spread.
Create a rippling but unstable wall from the earth.
Enhance ranged weaponry to deal bleed damage.
Temporarily gain the effects of a corrupted creature's manifestations
Use the Path of Numbers to boost your combat preparedness.
Wasp swarm defends or carries you.
As celestial healing, except target gains a stronger aura and fast healing 4 instead of 1.
Makes monster believe it is your ally.
Create a phantasm with effects for all senses.
Bestow a curse that is difficult to remove without fulfilling the condition.
Create a nonmagical weapon, shield, or set of armor.
Subjects take -2 on attack rolls, damage rolls, saves, and checks.
Creature catches fire the next time it sleeps for an hour.
Curse an area with four hazards
As death ward, but against daemons.
As daze, but affecting multiple creatures.
Set one of a list of contingencies for your demise.
Create an aura that feeds on the souls of those who die within it.
Grants bonuses against death spells and negative energy.
Prevent death from hit point damage so long as this spell persists.
Inflicts an ill fate on a creature, halving its damage when it attacks or casts a spell
Send messages as per message with a suggestion for one creature.
Provides useful advice for specific proposed actions.
Ward a target's mind to protect them while unconscious.
Animate and send your ear to spy for you
Trick opponents who try to cast enchantments on you.
Force a creature to protect and care for you.
Cause divinations of the future to reveal the result you choose.
You panic creatures caught in a 30ft cone of terror.
Assume the form of a Small or Medium fey creature
Targets gain a moral bonus to Strength, Constitution, and Will, as well as the rend ability with claws or unarmed strikes
Cause a summoned creature to explode.
As phantom steed, but immune to fire and can breathe a cone of smoke and ash
Gain the fire subtype or enhance an already existing subtype.
Control a zombie in human guise.
Worms deal hp and Dex damage.
Learn if an action you are about to take would be too difficult; choose an alternate path if it is.
As deep slumber, but only on one creature. This also causes them to lose some memories.
Disrupt and dispel spells that protect against cold
Gain the cold subtype or enhance an already existing subtype.
Commands subject of 7 HD or less.
Draw the remains of nearby destroyed undead, throwing them as a single mass of flesh at your enemy.
Allow an item to transform into a brand and back.
Create a bubble to block out all natural and magical precipitation within an area.
Exhale a cone of smoke which disorients those caught inside. It has a side effect of improving the effects of augury when cast within.
Sift through a creatures memories and make Knowledge checks with their modifier
Transform your tongue into a whip made out of energy.
Provide a heroism effect that you can reverse at any time
Give a creature a bite attack and a hunger for its own kind's flesh.
As hypnotism affecting more creatures and involving more requests
Hail deals 5d6 damage in cylinder 40 ft. across.
Transform the target into a half-elf form.
As infernal healing, except using fast healing 4.
Imbue a corporeal undead's natural attacks with dangerous spells
Creatures actions are seen as innocent
Channel planar energy into a summoned creature to heal it; can be done immediately when the creature drops to 0 or fewer hit points.
Humanoid becomes friendly to all other creatures.
Banish a soul to Hell if it dies within the next minute.
Animate a target's shadow, making it hunger for it's owner's life energy.
Create a link between you and a summoned creature, allowing you to switch places.
Become immune to gaze attacks and reflect them back on the creature using it
Determine if two things are identical.
Creates one cloth or wood object.
Mirror becomes a multiple-use dimension door.
Curse a creature's shadow to disrupt their actions
Steal the spells of a creature carrying the affected object
Mutate an extremity of the creature touched.
Cause splitting headaches and an oversensitivity to light and darkness.
Restrict target's access to its mythic power.
Imbues ammunition with accuracy against a specific creature type.
Immunizes subject against poison, detoxifies venom in or on subject.
Create a seductive song to lure all nearby creatures.
Use the Path of Numbers to fire rays of elemental energy.
Project your soul into an object, animating it.
Gain fast healing 2, immunity to bleed, and faster recovery from diseases and poisons.
Trick a creature into thinking it can't breathe.
Fearsome illusion kills subject or deals 3d6 damage.
Touch deals 1d3 Con damage 1/round for 6 rounds.
As per fog cloud, but lethally poisonous
A large pulse of positive enrgy damages undead and bolsters living creatures
Deal 1d6 points of damage per level to one haunt or spirit creature and stagger it.
Enhance an object to function as if it were masterwork quality.
Remove radiation effects from a target.
Foul liquid nauseates creatures that bite the target
Store hit point damage as magical energy.
Creatures that take this item become cursed with fatigue.
Target can breathe water and swim.
As possession, but you observe instead of control the subject.
Tornado-force winds knock creatures prone or from the air
Take more damage from opponents, but force them to become demoralized.
Spies on subject from a distance.
Weaken a creature to your divinations and enchantments
Teleport from one shadow to another.
Replace the target's body with mystic shadow material, causing them to take less damage from attacks.
As beast shape II, but you may only assume the form of an animal type identical to your companion or familiar.
Turn corpses into obedient skeleton crew.
Causes creature to move while asleep.
Protect your soul from harmful effects after death
Speak with a manifestation of a sentient plane
Target loses a 3rd-level prepared spell or spell slot.
Inflict touch spell upon creature that attacks you.
Summon an accuser devil to do your bidding.
As summon monster I, except you can summon one janni.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Triggered rune makes nearby creatures lose actions for 1 round/level.
Stifle other creatures' abilities to cast divine spells by attacking them.
Convince target that a nearby creature knows her greatest secret.
As tongues, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Touch infests a target with green slime.
As suggestion, but triggered only and target doesn't remember the suggestion.
Infuse mindless undead with power from the Shadow Plane, increasing their power.
Your glowing body dazzles or blinds others.
Alter an undead creature's energy affinity so it takes damage from negative energy and heals from positive energy.
As vermin shape, but Tiny or Large.
Plant a scrying sensor that you can use to spy on a creature, object, or location.
Cause a sleeping creature to retain some perception of its surroundings
Quickly advance the spread of diseases within the targeted creatures.

Outlines subject and produces light as a sunrod.
Place a scrying sensor on your animal companion or familiar.
Create a cloud-like spread of flame-resistant webbing.
Cause a creature to lose interest in its passions
As appearance of life, but deceiveing all of the senses
Creates a safe house for air-breathing creatures underwater
Deal 1d8/level nonlethal damage to a daemon and make it confused.
Dispels touched illusion or a creature's change in form.
Curse a creature to weaken the DCs of its abilities and deal minimum damage with its attacks
Summon a caulborn to answer questions
Withers one plant or deals 1d6/level damage to plant creature.
Transform a weapon into pure blightburn.
Boil the blood of your enemies, dealing constitution damage and causing fatigue.
Create writhing tentacles from your chest.
When a target is harmed, so is the target's relative.
Frees subjects from enchantments, transmutations, and curses.
Teleport a familiar or spirit animal to your side from miles away when it is injured
Create a trap from stalactites and stalagmites
As charm person, but affects multiple creatures within 30 ft.
Create an area of semi-real gore
Turn a creautre into a mask, which can be used to take on its appearence
Kills 3 HD or less; 4-6 HD save or die, 6+ HD take Con damage.
Reduce the targets move speeds, increased effect with creatures vulnerable to cold iron
Swap places with your animal companion, familiar, or spirit animal via teleportation
As compel tongue, except it affects multiple creatures.
Ask very powerful eldritch entities to find and converse with you, or they may reply telepathically.
Lets you ask question of extraplanar entity.
Infect a subject with a magical disease.
Cast a suggestion that gets passed on to secondary targets
Sap the powers of beneficial spells cast near to you.
Target is sickened while viewing trigger.
Curse a creature with a chance of instant and unexpected death.
As bestow curse, but harder to remove.
You unleash all the target's anger and destructive urges, causing it to fly into a violent bloodlust.
As dimension door, except you leave behind a burst of flame.
Ward shadows so light cannot penetrate them.
Reshape an undead creature to appear living.
As debilitating pain, with multiple targets
Target can safely remove its head
A stronger version of bleed for your master, this forces the animal servant to intercept any attack that targets you, even if it does not require an attack roll.
Stop a dragon from using its breath weapon along with reducing its magical prowess.
Create a duplicate of your familiar.
Create a conduit between master and familiar, allowing you to affect one while targeting the other.
Targets are panicked, and you gain temporary hit points.
Subject's Int and Cha drop to 1.
Control multiple zombies in human guise.
As lesser guardian monument, except with DR 4/magic.
Transform a half-orc into a full-blooded orc.
Quicken a soul's journey to judgement - hampering ressurection or weakening undead foes
Inscription casts your hex or major hex on those who pass it.
As hold person, but any creature.
You create a dimensional link with a targeted creature, and switch spots with it.
Enchant the ground to pull creatures beneath the surface.
Transfer a hex to someone else, allowing them to make use of it.
Create a small squad of ghouls led by a ghast, charged with necromantic energy.
Temporarily transfer one of your mythic path abilities to another creature.
As minor creation, plus stone and metal.
Designates action that triggers curse on subject.
Protect a creature from divination effects
Mutate a summoned creature to grant it new abilities.
Subjects in fog get -10 to Wis and Will checks.
As lesser object possession, but with a larger object.
Permanently sicken someone, worse if target is on or in the water far from shore.
You fly at a speed of 40 ft. and can hustle over long distances.
As pain strike, but affects multiple creatures.
Control the topic of conversation among a group of people.
As peacebond, but on multiple weapons, even if they aren't sheathed.
Fey forces target enemies with random combat maneuvers
Force a creature to see the negative side of things.
As cure serious wounds, but leave behind a latent venom.
Project your soul into a creature's body.
Place a protective ward to ensare creatures that attempt to possess you.
Bring a destroyed construct back to action for a limited time.
Stain the hand of a creature's killer red.
Brings dead subject back in a random body.
Convert bludgeoning and falling damage into nonlethal damage.
Curse a magic item, weakening it and causing its magical qualities to fail half of the time.
Cause giant mantis limbs to sprout from the ground, damaging and cripping creatures
Hides expensive chest on Ethereal Plane; you retrieve it at will.
Weak creatures are compelled to seek shelter
Cause a spirit inhabiting a creature or an object to go dormant.
Transfer a magical effect from another creature to yourself.
Cause a creature to perform a suggested action while sleeping.
Target is distracted by its sense of self.
Swap your soul with your familiar's.
Create a discordant blast of energy to disrupt a target's hold on magic and transfer it to you.
Create a sphere of energy to dispossess incorporeal creatures of stolen bodies.
Sap mythic power from another creature.
As steal years, but steal a greater amount of years and for longer.
As lesser summon genie, except summon one djinni or 1d3 jann.
As summon monster, except to summon a brimorak, incubus, thoxel demon, 1d3 schir demons, or 1d4+1 vermlek demons.
Summon 1d3 esobok psychopomps or 1d4+1 nosoi psychopomps.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
The target takes damage whenever its summoned creature does.
As sun's disdain, but targeting multiple creatures
Temporarily teleport yourself and others to the surface
Protect yourself against ingested poison, then spit it out in a cone.
Triggered rune wracks nearby creatures with pain.
Triggered rune puts nearby creatures into catatonic slumber.
As symbol of death, but fills a 5-foot square.
Instantly transports you as far as 100 miles per level.
Remove the face and eyes of a creature, magically melding them with your own.
Communicate with any creature with a mind.
Call upon the wild winds of the Abyssal atmosphere.
Create a number of invisible crew members to work on a ship.
Grow a long, wasp-like tail with stinger.
Transform ordinary dogs into fiendish minions.
Make an area seem worthless to others.
Create a whip made of poisonous centipedes.
Harden the air around the target into jagged invisible blades.
Fire a ray to deal Dexterity and Strength damage.
Four mithral daggers speed around you, attacking nearby creatures and protecting your spellcasting from attacks of opportunity.
Attempt to weakne a corruption's effect at risk to yourself
Steal lifeforce from one creature and imbue it into another
Mutate someone's shadow and trick the creature into believing they've transformed.
Cone deals 1d4 per level and panics creatures.
Use the restless dead to down your targets
Strike down creatures who thought you were their friend
As binding earth but with multiple targets.
Ability score drain from the Bleaching doesn't affect your ability score modifiers.
Causes living creatures within 5 ft. to fall asleep.
Ask questions of a Nalfeshnee demon that knows arcana, planes, and a Knowledge skill of your choice.
Sense creatures suffering from fear, then teleport close to them.
Curse someone to rub people the wrong way.
Curse an area with six dangerous hazards
As death knell aura, except dying creatures die much faster within the aura.
Take control of a creature's mind and implant deadly subconscious commands.
Make a creature so delicious that all others nearby are consumed by the desire to eat it.
As discharge, but with greater effects that can effect an area.
Works as dispel magic, but can affect multiple targets.
You become an incorporeal creature of dust for a short period of time.
Ward an item so it will be destroyed if others try to learn its purpose or use it.
Use Eldritch Conduit on more creatures at greater range.
Infect a subject with a highly contagious disease.
Target becomes panicked, sickened, and/or comatose.
As fester, but affecting multiple targets.
assume the form of a Tiny or Large fey creature
Shows most direct way to a location.
As lesser geas, but affects any creature.
Slowly transform a creature into an inanimate plant.
Array of magic effects protect area.
As harrowing, except affect an entire group of creatures and allow them some measure of control over their destiny.
Damn creatures to Hell with a blast of pure hellfire.
Gives +4 bonus on attack rolls, saves, skill checks; immunity to fear; temporary hp.
Infuse yourself with the powers of your deity's planar realm
As plane shift, but only works on willing creatures and only transports to the Inner Planes
Enhance your hands into fearsome claws that inflict negative levels.
Lets you learn tales about a person, place, or thing.
Target cannot leave a lasting impression on other creatures
Send a message to creatures within miles.
Place the target in suspended animation, restoring ability drain and regenerating missing limbs.
Switch minds with another creature for 1 hour per level.
As named bullet, but deals 2 points of damage for every caster level.
As neutralize poison, but with an automatic success on all caster level checks to neutralize poisons.
Disturb a creature's rest with dark dreams
Make a poison more difficult to resist.
Sense when nearby creatures have tratorous intent towards your lord
Trick a creature into thinking their flesh is rotting.
Induce an irrational fear in a creature to the point of madness.
Make the target a carrier of numerous diseases.
Gain cryptic information from further in the future than divination.
Restores life to subject who died as long as one day/level ago.
Gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls and heal slightly when you kill a creature
Charge magical runes to an explosive degree.
As confusion, but only affects constructs.
Learn information to aid you in assassinating a creature
Alter a creature's body with energy from the Shadow Plane, altering its form to match a shadow creature.
Possess the body of an animal
As antimagic field, except suppress only a specific type of spellcasting (arcane or divine).
Create a spectral saluqi, an undead canine, that can assist you in fighting spirits.
Target loses a 5th-level prepared spell or spell slot.
Summon giant eagles as mounts or battle companions
As lesser summon genie, except summon one shaitan, 1d3 djinn, or 1d4+1 jann.
Summon helpful petitioners to aid in construction and labor.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Turns your body into a swarm of vermin.
Symbol creates stormwinds and lightning when triggered
Temporarily grant control of your familiar to another creature.
As teleport, except you choose some creatures to suffer a mishap or go elsewhere.
Lets you see all things as they really are.
Plant a subconscious directive in the target's mind.
Create a barrier to repel undead.
Target is compelled to destroy one enemy.
Infect others with Xhamen-Dor's seeded infestation.

Make one of the creature's limbs useless.
As arcane sight, but also reveals magic effects on creatures and objects.
Temporarily suppress the most powerful qualities of a magical item.
Place an even greater curse on the subject.
Grants the target the benefits of a greater planar infusion
As Bite the Hand but with multiple creatures.
Mark someone which makes them afraid of water and turns aquatic creatures against them.
Protect yourself against a mind-affecting effect and redirect it to a nearby creature
Ask extraordinarily powerful eldritch entities to find and converse with you, or they may reply telepathically.
Send messages as per message with one suggestion for each creature.
Teleport multiple times between two designated locations.
Rip out the targets blood, forming it into a fiendish water elemental with blood drain
Toadstool circle leads to an extradimensional meadow.
As project image, but the image follows your familiar.
Assume the form of a Diminutive or Huge fey creature
Create a Grim to disrupt the targets sleep
Cures 10 points/level damage, all diseases and mental conditions.
As hold person, but all within 30 ft.
Provide a greater heroism effect that you can reverse at any time
You may target one creature for every four of your caster levels.
Give creatures bite attacks and a hunger for their own kind's flesh.
As inflict pain, but affecting one creature per level.
Transform a robot into a magical construct.
Use magic beetles as spies and also share their senses.
Prepared object appears in your hand.
As inveigle person, but affects any living creature
Increase the target's size by one category, granting bonuses to Strength, Con, natural armor, damage reduction, and more.
Transport the target to a dank prison in a horrific demiplane.
Create a spherical magnetic field around yourself to pull metal objects toward you.
